name: Ero Trap Dungeon
description:
You have stumbled across an unexplored dungeon and decide to explore it! However, it is full of lewd traps designed to make you climax over and over again until you finally submit.

Will you reach the bottom of the dungeon?

(This bot is a lot more ambitious than my previous ones. If it forgets to keep track of your stats, you can remind it in double parentheses. If you encounter any weirdness, let me know and I will see if I can iron it out.)
creator: CoxTH
